message:
fix(codegen): Use PyValue-First APIs for uncertain list operations

Update list codegen to route uncertain lists to pyListAppendPV,
pyListExtendPV, and pyListInsertPV instead of anytype versions.

Changes in src/codegen/native/methods/list.zig:
- genAppend: runtime.pyListAppend -> runtime.pyListAppendPV
- genExtend: runtime.pyListExtend -> runtime.pyListExtendPV
- genInsert: runtime.pyListInsert -> runtime.pyListInsertPV

The PV versions compile ONCE (no monomorphization) vs anytype versions
which create new instantiations per (container_type, item_type) pair.

Part of Phase 4 monomorphization fix for core1 tests.
